description: India's premier business intelligence publication, with 50K+ paying subscribers. Leading AI product development with potential to double revenue by 2026. Built 0-to-1 analytics stack, implemented Mixpanel, BigQuery, and dbt data warehouse. Reduced data requests by 95% and turn-around-time by ~85%.

Series A funded behavioral science startup serving 30+ Fortune 500 companies globally. Led experiments using behavioral economics (loss aversion, framing) to improve salesperson behavior. Ran an 18-month experiment with 6,000+ salespeople across India with Prof. Szu-chi Huang (Stanford). Drove ~12% sustained revenue increase for HDFC Bank and Cipla.

NYSE-listed ($1.35B revenue) business process management leader. Led the CFO Analytics Team building predictive ML models. Optimized $400M+ procurement spend with machine learning. Improved AP Invoice TAT prediction accuracy from ~25% to ~70% using boosting algorithms.
Highly selective fellowship program. Managed the entire university internship process for 2018–19 at the Career Development Office — coordinating 100+ recruiters and increasing offers by 330%.
Captain of the college football team. Co-founded TextMongers during this period — a bootstrapped content startup that reached 10 employees, 4 clients, and $5,000 MRR.
